title: NHI-PEDOT laminin hydrogel interphase validation package
objective: Determine whether a laminin-anchored, low-loading PEDOT:PSS neural hydrogel interphase is suitable to enter CL1-like MEA neural culture follow-up by proving acellular material stability, electrochemical benefit, and early neural compatibility without medium drift or material shedding.

scope.claim_after_success: Ready for longer CL1-like neural network pilot on MEA coupons, not yet proven as a final CL1 material.
scope.lead_design: Brain-soft hydrogel matrix with laminin or laminin-like adhesive presentation and low-loading PEDOT:PSS conductive microdomains on a defined MEA coupon.
scope.design_boundary: Direct cell-contact interface; no closed CL1 deployment until extract, soak, electrochemical, and biological pilot gates pass.
scope.not_in_scope: Implantable claims, GMP manufacturing, final sterilization validation, and irreversible modification of production CL1 hardware.

procurement_specs.required_spec: GelMA, hyaluronic-acid, or alginate-based matrix that can be tuned near brain-like low-kPa mechanics, prepared aseptically, and measured for swelling and extractables.
procurement_specs.preferred_format: Small-batch coupon casting or micropatterned format compatible with MEA witness coupons.
procurement_specs.reject_if: Unknown crosslinking chemistry, persistent photoinitiator toxicity, opacity that blocks inspection, or uncontrolled swelling over 24-72 h.

procurement_specs.required_spec: Low-loading PEDOT:PSS dispersion or preformed microdomain route with neutralized/rinsed formulation, recorded solids fraction, and no unqualified conductivity enhancer in the cell-contact path.
procurement_specs.preferred_format: Dose ladder with hydrogel-only control, low PEDOT:PSS lead, and high PEDOT:PSS challenge article.
procurement_specs.reject_if: Acidic pH drift, visible particle shedding, uncontrolled PSS/leachable release, or impedance benefit only at cell-toxic loading.

procurement_specs.required_spec: Laminin, laminin-derived peptide, or ECM-mimetic adhesive motif compatible with the selected hydrogel chemistry and neural culture model.
procurement_specs.preferred_format: Matched hydrogel-plus-laminin control without PEDOT:PSS to isolate electrical versus biochemical effects.
procurement_specs.reject_if: Adhesive cue rapidly desorbs, blocks electrodes, causes unstable coating thickness, or fails to support neurite outgrowth in controls.

procurement_specs.required_spec: MEA-like electrode coupon or disposable MEA with known electrode geometry, insulation material, optical access, and stable baseline impedance.
procurement_specs.preferred_format: Dedicated test coupon, not a production CL1 consumable, with uncoated, laminin-only, and hydrogel-only controls.
procurement_specs.reject_if: Unknown electrode material, poor baseline impedance stability, opaque layout, or bonding chemistry that cannot be replicated.

test_articles.description: MEA coupon with standard cell-culture coating or uncoated material-control state.
MEA coupon with laminin or laminin-like adhesive cue but no hydrogel or PEDOT:PSS phase.
Soft hydrogel plus laminin presentation without conductive PEDOT:PSS.
Soft laminin-presenting hydrogel with low-loading PEDOT:PSS microdomains.
Same hydrogel and laminin presentation with higher PEDOT:PSS loading for conductivity-versus-toxicity boundary testing.

run_matrix.name: Acellular material blank and extract
run_matrix.purpose: Detect medium drift, leachables, swelling, shedding, opacity, and delamination before live-cell exposure.
inputs: fresh complete neuronal medium or closest CL1-like medium proxy

run_matrix.name: Electrochemical and physical stability
run_matrix.purpose: Measure whether PEDOT:PSS loading improves interface metrics without thickness, transparency, swelling, or adhesion failure.

run_matrix.name: Neural compatibility pilot
run_matrix.purpose: Test whether the lead improves or preserves neural survival, neurites, morphology, and early network activity compared with laminin and hydrogel controls.
inputs: primary cortical neurons or human iPSC-derived cortical neurons

assay_panel.readout: pH, osmolality, conductivity, visible particulates, color/opacity, and precipitate
assay_panel.method_class: standard media chemistry, visual inspection, and microscopy
assay_panel.sample_matrix: fresh medium soak and extract samples
assay_panel.control_requirement: same timepoints for no-coating, laminin-only, and hydrogel-only controls

assay_panel.readout: Hydrogel thickness, swelling, delamination, cracking, electrode-window occlusion, and optical transparency
assay_panel.method_class: profilometry or calibrated microscopy plus image log

assay_panel.readout: Electrochemical impedance spectroscopy, charge-storage capacity, cyclic-voltammetry drift, and stimulation-safe voltage excursion where available
assay_panel.sample_matrix: coated MEA coupons before and after medium soak
assay_panel.control_requirement: uncoated, laminin-only, and hydrogel-only coupon baselines

assay_panel.readout: Metabolic viability, LDH release or equivalent cytotoxicity, live/dead imaging
assay_panel.method_class: in vitro cytotoxicity and neural culture viability assay
assay_panel.sample_matrix: neural culture on coated coupons and material extracts
assay_panel.control_requirement: negative material control and positive cytotoxicity control

assay_panel.readout: Neurite length/density, network coverage, cell clustering, and morphology stress flags
assay_panel.sample_matrix: neural culture on coated MEA coupons

assay_panel.readout: Spike rate, burst metrics, electrode yield, impedance drift during culture, and network synchrony where available
assay_panel.control_requirement: same culture batch across laminin-only, hydrogel-only, lead, and high-loading challenge articles

acceptance_gates.criterion: Acellular soak or extract shows no material-driven pH drift greater than 0.10 pH units, no osmolality or conductivity drift greater than 5 percent versus hydrogel-free controls, no visible shedding/precipitate, and no unresolved color/opacity issue.
acceptance_gates.rationale: A direct cell-contact material cannot advance if it changes base neural medium chemistry or sheds material.
acceptance_gates.failure_response: Reduce PEDOT:PSS loading, change matrix/pre-rinse/crosslinking, or reject the formulation before cell exposure.

acceptance_gates.criterion: Hydrogel thickness changes less than 20 percent, no delamination/cracking, electrode windows remain inspectable, and transparency remains sufficient for cell monitoring after 72 h soak.
acceptance_gates.rationale: MEA culture needs stable geometry and optical access; swelling or delamination can dominate biological outcomes.
acceptance_gates.failure_response: Change matrix concentration, anchoring chemistry, pattern geometry, or crosslinking route.

acceptance_gates.criterion: The low-loading lead improves impedance or charge-storage metrics by at least 25 percent versus hydrogel-laminin control after soak, without unstable cyclic-voltammetry drift.
acceptance_gates.rationale: PEDOT:PSS must add measurable electrical value beyond a soft biochemical coating.
acceptance_gates.failure_response: Rerank loading, domain geometry, or drop PEDOT:PSS if the hydrogel-only control is equivalent.

acceptance_gates.criterion: Lead viability, LDH or equivalent cytotoxicity, neurite coverage, and morphology are non-inferior to laminin-only and hydrogel-laminin controls at early timepoints.
acceptance_gates.rationale: The lead is only useful if its electrical benefit does not degrade basic neural health.
acceptance_gates.failure_response: Lower PEDOT:PSS loading, improve rinse/neutralization, change ECM presentation, or reject the conductive phase.

acceptance_gates.criterion: Lead MEA cultures maintain electrode yield and network activity at least non-inferior to hydrogel-laminin controls, with lower impedance drift, through the pilot window.
acceptance_gates.rationale: For CL1-like use, material suitability must be functional, not only cytocompatible.
acceptance_gates.failure_response: If cells survive but network activity falls, change stiffness, ligand density, thickness, or conductive-domain geometry before longer tests.

decision_rules.condition: All H-A/H-B/H-C gates pass for low-loading NHI-PEDOT
decision_rules.action: Promote to cell-contact biological pilot candidate and design a longer MEA network stability study.

decision_rules.condition: Blank and neural health pass but electrochemical benefit fails
decision_rules.action: Demote PEDOT:PSS to optional and compare hydrogel-laminin-only coating against simpler PDA-laminin controls.

decision_rules.condition: Electrochemical benefit passes but neural health fails
decision_rules.action: Reduce PEDOT:PSS loading, strengthen rinse/neutralization, or reject the conductive phase before live-cell continuation.

decision_rules.condition: High-loading challenge outperforms lead electrically but harms cells
decision_rules.action: Use the high-loading result only as an upper toxicity/electrical boundary; do not promote it.

decision_rules.condition: Hydrogel swells, delaminates, or blocks optical/MEA access
decision_rules.action: Change matrix, anchoring chemistry, or geometry before any biological interpretation.
